name: Tournamental Press Kit
description: Brand assets, founder headshots, product screenshots, and boilerplates for journalists, bloggers, and partners writing about Tournamental.

license.logos: Tournamental Holdings, may be reproduced verbatim in articles about Tournamental
license.screenshots: Tournamental Holdings, may be reproduced verbatim in articles about Tournamental

contents.description: Tournamental T mark, vector. Use against dark backgrounds at 16px and above.
Tournamental T mark, raster, 512x512, transparent. For embeds where SVG is not supported.
Tournamental full wordmark, vector. Use at 200px wide and above for legibility.
Tim Lyons, founder. 2048x2048, neutral background. Use with credit Photo by Tournamental.
Bracket app, save-don't-lock view, 2880x1800 retina. Source: apps/web/.
3D molecule pyramid visualisation, 48-team base rising to champion atom. 2880x1800 retina.
3D match renderer playing the 2022 World Cup Final AR-FR. 2880x1800 retina.
Auto-generated podium share card, 1200x630, gold-silver-bronze podium with predicted champion.
Tournamental brand colour palette: accent (gold), ink (midnight), border tints.
Standard About Tournamental paragraph in NZ English. One-paragraph and one-sentence variants.

boilerplates.oneSentence: Tournamental is an open-source tournament-prediction platform that lets you predict the FIFA World Cup 2026 with your friends, watch every match in a browser-based 3D renderer, and share platform revenue with the contributors who build it through Drips Network.
boilerplates.oneParagraph: Tournamental is an open-source tournament-prediction platform for the FIFA World Cup 2026 and other major sports tournaments. Every prediction is timestamped before kickoff and signed on-chain, every match plays out in a browser-based 3D renderer, every contributor shares in the platform's revenue through Drips Network. The platform is licensed under Apache 2.0, documentation is licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0. Headquarters: New Zealand. Live at tournamental.com.
boilerplates.longForm: Tournamental is an open-source tournament-prediction platform built around three ideas the closed-source incumbents do not ship: save-don't-lock mechanics (players can change every pick until the match kicks off), VStamp on-chain receipts (every save is timestamped and signed before kickoff, anyone can verify it), and a contributor revenue split through Drips Network (a fixed fraction of platform revenue flows on-chain to whoever shipped the work). The product launches for the FIFA World Cup 2026 with a 3D match renderer driven by StatsBomb open data, a molecule pyramid visualisation of every player's bracket, path-based syndicates at play.tournamental.com/s/<slug>, and a podium share card pipeline that auto-generates on every save. The full codebase is at github.com/0800tim/tournamental under Apache 2.0, the documentation pack is CC-BY 4.0, and the Drips contract that pays contributors is public.
